## Combined-Model Classification Margins

```{r}
source(here::here("R", "PMM_112_Margins.R"))
```

```{r}
#| fig-cap: "Histograms of combined-model class probabilities in the HRS/HCAP sample"
#| fig-width: 10
#| fig-height: 4
PMM_112$figure
```

```{r}
#| tbl-cap: "Most likely combined-model class membership in the HRS/HCAP sample (N = 3496)"
PMM_112$table
```

```{r}
#| tbl-cap: "Langa-Weir class membership in the HRS/HCAP sample (N = 3496)"
PMM_112$langa_weir_table
```
